title: 骁龙8 Elite Gen 5与天玑9500旗舰SoC对比：2026年最强安卓芯片
claim: 骁龙8 Elite Gen 5基于台积电3nm制程，gaming性能比上代提升23%，GPU功耗降低20%，是2026年最强安卓处理器
raw_text: Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 built on TSMC 3nm, 23% higher gaming performance vs prev gen, 20% lower GPU power. Considered strongest Android processor in 2026.

title: 2026年智能手机SoC市场：出货量下滑7%但营收增长，联发科领跑34%份额
claim: 2026年全球手机SoC出货量同比下降7%，但市场总收入实现两位数增长。联发科34%份额领跑，高通24.7%，苹果18.3%
raw_text: 2026 global smartphone SoC shipments down 7% YoY, revenue up double-digits. MediaTek 34%, Qualcomm 24.7%, Apple 18.3%.

title: 台积电2nm N2量产进展：月产能2026年达10万片，苹果占初期产能近50%
claim: 台积电N2制程2025年Q4量产，初期月产能约3.5万片，2026年底有望达14万片；苹果独占初期产能约50%；代工报价约3万美元/片
raw_text: TSMC N2 mass production started Q4 2025, initial capacity ~35k wafers/month, target 140k by end 2026. Apple takes ~50% of initial capacity. Price ~$30k/wafer.

title: 台积电N2P工艺2026年下半年量产，性能再提升5-10%
claim: 台积电N2P将于2026年下半年量产，相比N2性能提升5%-10%，功耗再降5%-10%
raw_text: TSMC N2P scheduled for mass production H2 2026, 5-10% perf boost, 5-10% power reduction vs N2.

title: 联发科天玑9600：首款2nm手机芯片，采用台积电N2工艺
claim: 联发科将推出首款2nm手机芯片天玑9600，采用台积电2nm工艺
raw_text: MediaTek to launch Dimensity 9600, its first 2nm chip, on TSMC N2.

title: 高通骁龙8 Elite Gen 6与Gen 6 Pro双旗舰战略
claim: 高通将同步推出骁龙8 Elite Gen 6与Gen 6 Pro两款旗舰SoC
raw_text: Qualcomm to launch dual flagship: Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 6 and Gen 6 Pro.

title: 高通联合CXMT开发3D DRAM独立NPU模组，目标2027年AI手机
claim: 高通正与中国CXMT合作开发独立NPU+3D DRAM模组：约40 TOPS AI算力，4GB堆叠内存，采用TSV+混合键合，预计2027年推出，首批面向4000-4500元价位安卓手机
raw_text: Qualcomm working with CXMT on standalone NPU + 3D stacked DRAM: ~40 TOPS AI compute, 4GB memory, TSV + hybrid bonding. Targeting late 2026/early 2027, RMB 4000-4500 range phones. Not officially confirmed by Qualcomm.

title: BOE以低5美元报价争夺三星Galaxy S27基础款OLED面板订单
claim: BOE正以每片低于三星Display 5美元的报价争夺Galaxy S27基础款OLED订单；三星MX已对BOE样品测试超一个月；S27+和S27 Ultra将继续使用三星自研AMOLED 2X面板
raw_text: BOE seeks Galaxy S27 base model OLED by undercutting Samsung Display by $5/panel. Samsung MX has been evaluating BOE samples for over a month. No major technical difficulties reported. S27+ and Ultra stay with Samsung Display AMOLED 2X.

title: 三星收回iPhone 18 Pro OLED业务，BOE份额受压
claim: 三星Display已从BOE手中重新夺回iPhone 18 Pro的OLED面板供货业务
raw_text: Samsung Display takes back iPhone 18 Pro OLED business from BOE.

title: BOE成都B16 8.6代IT AMOLED产线2026年5月底正式量产
claim: BOE成都B16 8.6代IT AMOLED产线于2026年5月底开始量产，主要面向笔记本、平板、车载，兼顾手机AMOLED
raw_text: BOE B16 8.6-Gen IT AMOLED fab in Chengdu began mass production end of May 2026, targeting IT, automotive, and smartphone AMOLED.

title: 苹果OLED供应链2026：三星约1.2亿片，LGD约8500万片，BOE约5500万片
claim: 2026年苹果OLED面板供应：三星约1.2亿片，LGD约8500万片，BOE约5500万片；SDC独家供应折叠屏约1000万片
raw_text: Apple OLED 2026 supply: Samsung ~120M units, LGD ~85M units, BOE ~55M units. SDC sole foldable OLED supplier at ~10M units.

title: HBM占总DRAM晶圆产出23%，AI需求挤压手机用内存供应
claim: 2026年HBM将占DRAM总晶圆产出的23%（去年19%），AI数据中心消耗全球约70%内存芯片；三星、SK海力士、美光战略性向HBM转产，导致手机用DRAM供应吃紧，Q1 2026内存价格涨幅40-50%
raw_text: HBM takes 23% of DRAM wafer output in 2026 (up from 19%). AI data centers consume ~70% of all memory chips. Samsung, SK Hynix, Micron reallocating capacity to HBM. Memory prices rose 40-50% Q1 2026. Smartphone market may shrink 5%.

title: 手机用DRAM和NAND价格大涨，BOM成本占比升至20%以上
claim: DRAM和NAND Flash持续供不应求，2026年在智能手机BOM中成本占比升至20%以上
raw_text: DRAM and NAND Flash continuing supply shortage, BOM cost share in smartphones up to 20%+ in 2026.

title: 硅碳电池手机2026：中国品牌已普及，三星/苹果最早2027年跟进
claim: 2026年硅碳电池已在中国品牌旗舰机普及（OnePlus 15: 7300mAh，iQOO 15 Ultra: 7400mAh，荣耀Magic Win: 10001mAh/8.3mm机身）；三星承认正在评估，最早出现在2026年底或2027年；苹果尚未采用
raw_text: Silicon-carbon batteries mainstream in Chinese flagships: OnePlus 15 (7300mAh), iQOO 15 Ultra (7400mAh), Honor Magic Win (10001mAh, 8.3mm thin). Samsung acknowledges evaluating, may appear late 2026 or 2027. Apple not yet adopted.

title: 240W有线快充成中国品牌标配，Realme GT3实测9分30秒充满4600mAh
claim: 240W有线快充已成为Realme、小米等中国品牌标配；Realme GT3实测4600mAh电池9分30秒充满，创行业基准
raw_text: 240W wired charging standard among Chinese brands. Realme GT3: 4600mAh 0-100% in 9m30s.

title: 2026年折叠屏手机：三星Galaxy Z TriFold与华为Mate XT横向对比
claim: 2026年三折叠屏手机进入主流视野，三星Galaxy Z TriFold与华为Mate XT成为对标机型；折叠手机'失败时代'正式结束
raw_text: 2026 tri-fold guide comparing Huawei Mate XT and Samsung Galaxy Z TriFold. Android Central: foldable phone 'failure' is over, 2026 set to change everything.

title: 2026年手机端侧AI：NPU性能跃升，on-device LLM推理成主流
claim: 2026年手机NPU性能大幅跃升，on-device LLM推理成主流；各主要OEM以NPU差异化竞争；内存带宽成为端侧AI瓶颈
raw_text: On-device AI mainstream in 2026. NPU performance major jump. OEMs differentiating via NPU. Memory bandwidth bottleneck for edge AI.

title: AI内存墙瓶颈：Qualcomm+CXMT 3D DRAM NPU方案意在突破带宽限制
claim: Qualcomm+CXMT 3D DRAM NPU方案核心目标是突破LPDDR5X带宽上限，通过TSV+混合键合将4GB HBM级内存与独立NPU堆叠，提供比常规移动设置更快的数据移动速度
raw_text: Qualcomm+CXMT 3D DRAM NPU: TSV + hybrid bonding stacks 4GB HBM-class memory with standalone NPU, targeting faster data movement than standard LPDDR5X. Aims to break memory wall for mobile AI.

title: 2026年台积电2nm被英伟达高通考虑转投三星的传言
claim: 有传言称英伟达、高通考虑将部分2nm订单从台积电转投三星，但未有官方证实
raw_text: Rumor: Nvidia and Qualcomm considering moving some 2nm orders from TSMC to Samsung. Not officially confirmed.

title: 三星考虑为Galaxy S27基础款引入BOE屏幕节省成本，消费者质量担忧发酵
claim: 消息称三星Galaxy S27基础款或使用BOE OLED面板以降成本，引发消费者对旗舰品质的担忧；三星内部以各自独立商业单位运作，MX部门须按市价向SDC采购
raw_text: Leak: Samsung Galaxy S27 base model may use BOE OLED to cut costs. Consumer backlash over flagship quality. Samsung MX pays same market rate as any external customer for SDC panels.

title: 2026年先进制程5/4/3/2nm占手机SoC产值半壁江山
claim: 2026年5nm及以下先进制程芯片已占智能手机SoC市值约50%
raw_text: 5/4/3/2nm advanced nodes account for ~50% of smartphone SoC market value in 2026.

title: IDC：全球内存短缺危机或致2026年智能手机市场萎缩5%
claim: IDC报告：AI驱动的全球内存短缺危机可能导致2026年智能手机市场萎缩5%，PC市场萎缩最高9%
raw_text: IDC: AI-driven global memory shortage may shrink smartphone market by 5% and PC market up to 9% in 2026.

title: Fortune：AI对内存的贪婪需求正引发全球芯片危机
claim: 三星、SK海力士、美光这三家控制全球95%以上DRAM产能的公司，正系统性地将产能向AI加速器所需的HBM转移，导致消费电子内存供应结构性短缺
raw_text: Samsung, SK Hynix, Micron (95%+ of DRAM) systematically reallocating capacity to HBM for AI accelerators. Structural shortage in consumer DRAM.

title: 荣耀Magic Win实现10001mAh超大容量电池仅8.3mm厚，硅碳技术里程碑
claim: 荣耀Magic Win采用硅碳电池实现10001mAh容量，机身厚度仅8.3mm，创下大容量超薄手机新纪录
raw_text: Honor Magic Win: 10001mAh silicon-carbon battery in 8.3mm thin body.

title: 台积电2nm N2良率已超70%，量产稳定性有保障
claim: 台积电2nm制程试产良率已超过70%，具备稳定量产条件
raw_text: TSMC 2nm process yield >70% in risk production, ready for stable mass production.

title: 2026年手机市场整体熄火，联发科高通转向AI服务器等'新饭碗'
claim: 2026年手机市场整体低迷，联发科、高通等芯片厂商加速向AI服务器、PC、汽车等领域多元化转型
raw_text: 2026 smartphone market sluggish. MediaTek and Qualcomm accelerating diversification into AI servers, PC, automotive.

title: Samsung Galaxy S27 BOE显示屏测试：每月130万台规模节省成本可观
claim: 三星Galaxy S27基础款月出货量约130万台，若采用BOE面板每片节省5美元，月节省成本可达650万美元
raw_text: Galaxy S27 base model ~1.3M units/month. BOE saves $5/panel = ~$6.5M/month in savings.

title: 2026年折叠手机'失败'终结：市场扩张、技术成熟驱动主流化
claim: 折叠手机市场经历多年艰难期后，2026年因铰链技术成熟、屏幕折痕减少、价格下降而进入主流化阶段
raw_text: Foldable phone failure era over in 2026 due to mature hinge tech, reduced crease, lower prices entering mainstream.
